name: io.github.embeddedci-com/embeddedci-mcp
description: Drive an EmbeddedCI BenchPod hardware-in-the-loop tester: power, flash over SWD, capture UART, and emulate/decode an I2C sensor on a real target board.

runtime_arguments.name: --connection
runtime_arguments.description: Default BenchPod connection: host[:port], a serial device path, or 'serial'.

environment_variables.name: BENCHPOD_CONNECTION
environment_variables.description: Fallback BenchPod connection when --connection / the connect tool is not given one.
